textByHash.7a595d114534c93a0074dece3127c476cb33c0dc: Hello, how can I help you?
textByHash.ae0de34a25a7afa0f385d11c1655498365224643: My name is Krato. I'm an assistant librarian for the Historical Archive.
textByHash.b5278f2f792fe705c4f03a072fe1f1e9aa78ae75: If you're looking for something specific you should speak to Istoria.
textByHash.d4a06b0fafffce8de2320eedfce2c9db5d8816a6: This is the Library Historical Archive. Here you'll find historical documents and texts from all eras of Great Kourend's history, dating all the way back to the first decade.
